0.text: Pleural effusion on the right, measuring 3.0 cm at its thickest point

1.text: Minimal pleural effusion on the left

2.text: Atelectasis in the lower lobes of both lungs adjacent to the pleural effusion

3.text: Linear atelectasis in the lower lobes of both lungs

4.text: Linear atelectasis in the upper lobe of the left lung

5.text: Linear atelectasis in the middle lobe of the right lung

7.text: Subcentimeter nonspecific nodules in both lungs
